title: LTX-2.3 app integration — stand up the LTX video model family (workflow-gen + deps + audio modes UI)
description: Bring LTX-2.3 into Cubric Vision as a full model family. Currently ZERO app-side presence (no model entry, no deps manifest, no workflow files, no handler). The ship workflow is authored + tested + saved (D:/WORK/workflows/App/LTX_i2v_t2v_template.json, also G:/ComfyUi/ComfyUI/user/default/workflows/) with all audio decisions LOCKED (see brief.md). This card decomposes the app integration: (1) generate_ltx.py workflow-gen handler + registry prefix -> LTX23_i2v.json/_stage2 + LTX23_t2v.json/_stage2; (2) LTX model entry + deps manifest (use the RE-HOSTED HF urls, see brief); (3) operations registration in commandRegistry; (4) the AUDIO MODE UI (Reference|Original presence-gated radio driving the two MpiIfElse gates) in MpiPromptBox; (5) the tier-2 capture-title app fix (commandExecutor.js ~line 903 must accept Output_Preview/Output_Video). NOT a one-session job. Goes through brainstorm/large-plan before implementation. Re-host BLOCKER already CLEARED this session (all 4 third-party files mirrored to HF).
